support_policy.window: Releases from 0.9.0 onward. Every entry in supported_upgrades is exercised by the release compatibility gate: install with the prior release, then upgrade with the candidate.
support_policy.downgrade: unsupported — an instance newer than its engine is always an error; upgrade the engine, never the instance
support_policy.schema: Repository schema compatibility is an independent integer sequence (.pose/schema-version); pose upgrade applies ordered idempotent migrations. SemVer of the binary never implies schema compatibility.
support_policy.prior_artifact_authentication: Each supported prior release pins the SHA-256 of its checksums.txt; the compatibility gate verifies the pin before executing any downloaded binary.
